        s['denialCounters']['consecutive'] = 0
        s['denialCounters']['total'] = 0
        s['denialHistory'] = []
print(json.dumps(data,indent=2))

cd /root/ZeroDayMMO/zeroday-client-godot && cat > addons/zero_day_mmo/core/ui/SkillTreeUI.gd << 'EOF'
extends Control

# GDScript Skill Tree UI
# Displays skill tree and progression

signal skill_tree_ready()

var _skill_tree: SkillTree

func _ready():
    _setup_ui()

func _setup_ui():
    # Create skill tree node
    var tree_node = TreeNode.new()
    tree_node.position = Vector2(50, 50)
    add_child(tree_node)
    
    # Connect signals
    _skill_tree.connect("skill_activated", _on_skill_activated)
    _skill_tree.connect("skill_level_up", _on_skill_level_up)
    emit_signal("skill_tree_ready")

func _on_skill_activated(skill_name: String) -> void:
    print("Skill activated: %s" % skill_name)

func _on_skill_level_up(skill_name: String, level: int) -> void:
    print("Skill level up: %s to level %d" % (skill_name, level))
EOF

cd /root/ZeroDayMMO/zeroday-client-godot && cat > addons/zero_day_mmo/core/WorldMapUI.gd << 'EOF'
extends Control

# World Map UI
# Displays the world map and player areas

signal world_map_loaded()

var _world_map: WorldMap
var _map_view: CanvasItem
var _player_position: Label

func _ready():
    _setup_ui()

func _setup_ui():
    # Create map view
    _map_view = CanvasItem.new()
    add_child(_map_view)
    
    # Create player position label
    _player_position = Label.new()
    _player_position.text = "Player: 127.0.0.1"
    _player_position.position = Vector2(100, 100)
    add_child(_player_position)
    
    # Connect signals
    _world_map.connect("world_map_loaded", _on_world_map_loaded)
    _world_map.connect("player_moved", _on_player_moved)
    emit_signal("world_map_loaded")

func _on_world_map_loaded() -> void:
    print("World map loaded")
    
    # Update map view
    _update_map_view()

func _on_player_moved(player_ip: String, new_ip: String) -> void:
    _player_position.text = "Player: %s" % new_ip
    
    # Update map view
    _update_map_view()

func _update_map_view() -> void:
    # Example: Draw nodes on map
    var nodes = _world_map.get_nodes()
    for node in nodes:
        var node_item = CanvasItem.new()
        node_item.position = Vector2(node.x, node.y)
        node_item.texture = load_texture("res://assets/node_%s.png" % node.type)
        add_child(node_item)
EOF

cd /root/ZeroDayMMO/zeroday-client-godot && cat > addons/zero_day_mmo/core/ZeroDayCore.gd << 'EOF'
extends Node

# Core ZeroDayMMO Game Logic
# Manages player progression, storylines, and world map

var current_player: PlayerData
var game_state: GameState = GameState.DISCONNECTED
var current_storyline: String = "tutorial"

signal world_map_loaded()
signal storyline_started(storyline: String)
signal storyline_progress(storyline: String, progress: int)
signal storyline_completed(storyline: String)

var _world_map: WorldMap
var _storyline_manager: StorylineManager
var _network_manager: NetworkManager
var _player_base: PlayerBase
var _player_movement: PlayerMovement
var _resource_manager: ResourceManager
var _combat_system: CombatSystem

func _ready():
    _initialize_components()
    _setup_signals()

func _initialize_components():
    _world_map = WorldMap.new()
    _storyline_manager = StorylineManager.new()
    _network_manager = NetworkManager.new()
    _player_base = PlayerBase.new()
    _player_movement = PlayerMovement.new()
    _resource_manager = ResourceManager.new()
    _combat_system = CombatSystem.new()
    
    # Connect components
    _world_map.connect("world_map_loaded", _on_world_map_loaded)
    _storyline_manager.connect("storyline_started", _on_storyline_started)
    _network_manager.connect("connected", _on_player_connected)
    _player_base.connect("base_built", _on_base_built)
    _player_movement.connect("player_moved", _on_player_moved)

func _setup_signals():
    _connect_signals()

func _connect_signals():
    # Connect signals
    _world_map.connect("node_activated", _on_node_activated)
    _world_map.connect("player_moved", _on_player_moved)
    _world_map.connect("node_attacked", _on_node_attacked)
    _storyline_manager.connect("storyline_progress", _on_storyline_progress)
    _storyline_manager.connect("storyline_completed", _on_storyline_completed)

func _on_world_map_loaded() -> void:
    print("World map loaded")
    
    # Start tutorial storyline
    _storyline_manager.start_storyline("tutorial")

func _on_storyline_started(storyline: String) -> void:
    current_storyline = storyline
    print("Storyline started: %s" % storyline)
    
    # Show appropriate scene
    if storyline == "tutorial":
        ui.show_tutorial()
    elif storyline == "faction_base":
        ui.show_faction_base()
    elif storyline == "advanced_map":
        ui.show_advanced_map()

func _on_player_connected(ip: String) -> void:
    print("Player connected: %s" % ip)
    
    # Initialize player
    current_player = PlayerData.new({"ip": ip})
    
    # Load player area
    _load_player_area(ip)

func _on_base_built(ip_id: String, subnet: String) -> void:
    print("Base built at %s with subnet %s" % (ip_id, subnet))
    
    # Update storyline
    _storyline_manager.progress_storyline("build_base")

func _on_player_moved(ip: String, new_ip: String) -> void:
    print("Player moved from %s to %s" % (ip, new_ip))
    
    # Update player area
    _load_player_area(new_ip)
    
    # Check if player moved away from localhost
    if new_ip != "127.0.0.1":
        _storyline_manager.progress_storyline("explore_router")

func _on_node_activated(ip_id: String, node_type: String) -> void:
    print("Node activated: %s (%s)" % (ip_id, node_type))
    
    # Update storyline
    if ip_id == "192.168.1.1":
        _storyline_manager.progress_storyline("control_router")

func _on_storyline_progress(storyline: String, progress: int) -> void:
    print("Storyline progress: %s (%d/%d)" % (storyline, progress, _storylines[storyline].progression.size()))

func _on_storyline_completed(storyline: String) -> void:
    print("Storyline completed: %s" % storyline)
    
    # Move to next storyline
    if storyline == "tutorial":
        _storyline_manager.start_storyline("faction_base")
    elif storyline == "faction_base":
        _storyline_manager.start_storyline("advanced_map")
EOF
